# 原根

* 只有 $ 2,4,,p^k,2p^k $(p为奇素数) 
* $ O(n+\sqrt {\phi (n)}+n^{\frac{1}{4}}log^2n)$
```cpp
int phi[N],root[N];
vector<int> prime,fac,ans;// 质数,欧拉函数的质因子,所有原根
void init(){
    phi[1]=1;
    for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
        if(!phi[i]){
            prime.push_back(i);
            phi[i]=i-1;
        }
        for(int j=0;j<prime.size()&&prime[j]*i<N;j++){
            if(i%prime[j]==0){
                phi[i*prime[j]]=phi[i]*prime[j];
                break;
            }
            else{
                phi[i*prime[j]]=phi[i]*(prime[j]-1);
            }
        }
    }
    root[2]=1;
    root[4]=3;
    for(int i=1;i<prime.size();i++){
        for(int j=1;j*prime[i]<N;j*=prime[i])root[j*prime[i]]=1;
        for(int j=2;j*prime[i]<N;j*=prime[i])root[j*prime[i]]=1;
    }
}
int qpow(int a,int b,int mod){
    int ans=1;
    for(;b;b>>=1){
        if(b&1)ans=ans*a%mod;
        a=a*a%mod;
    }
    return ans;
}
// sqrt(n)+n^{1/4}*log^2n
int findroot(int m){
    if(m==2)return 1;
    if(m==167772161)return 3;
    if(m==469762049)return 3;
    if(m==754974721)return 11;
    if(m==998244353)return 3;
    if(m==4)return 3;
    int d=phi[m];
    if(d%2==0){
        fac.push_back(2);
        while(d%2==0)d/=2;
    }
    for(int i=3;i*i<=d;i++){
        if(d%i==0){
            fac.push_back(i);
            while(d%i==0)d/=i;
        }
    }
    if(d>1)fac.push_back(d);
    for(int g=2;;g++){
        if(qpow(g,phi[m],m)!=1)continue;
        bool ok=true;
        for(auto &p:fac){
            if(qpow(g,phi[m]/p,m)==1){
                ok=false;
                break;
            }
        }
        if(ok)return g;
    }
}
void getroot(int m,int x){
    int res=1;
    for(int i=1;i<=phi[m];i++){
        res=res*x%m;
        if(__gcd(i,phi[m])==1)ans.push_back(res);
    }
}
void solve(){
    int n,d;
    cin>>n>>d;
    if(!root[n]){
        cout<<"0\n\n";
        return;
    }
    fac.clear();
    ans.clear();
    getroot(n,findroot(n));
    sort(ans.begin(),ans.end());
    cout<<ans.size()<<"\n";
    for(int i=1;i*d<=ans.size();i++)cout<<ans[i*d-1]<<" ";
    cout<<"\n";
}
```
